summary.en: citizenM rebuilt the hotel value curve for mobile travelers: compact rooms, self check-in, strong design, central locations, and luxury touches without full-service hotel complexity.
summary.zh: citizenM 为移动旅行者重画酒店价值曲线：小房间、自助入住、强设计、核心地段和关键奢华触点，同时避开全服务酒店复杂度。
